title: dendrocnide peltata var. peltata
intro: Dendrocnide peltata var. peltata, also known as the giant stinging tree, is a species of tree native to New Caledonia. This plant is known for its potent neurotoxins, making it potentially useful for medicinal purposes. Research has shown that extracts from Dendrocnide peltata var. peltata may possess analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be beneficial for pain relief and reducing inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, infusions, or poultices, although caution is advised due to its potent toxicity.
